titleStmt.title: SII 30.21: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 21. (A.R. No. 98 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the west and south walls of the same maṇḍapa Vīrarājēndra: year 29+6: 1241 A.D.

summary.p: Fragmentary. This inscription seems to register some decision taken by various corporate bodies of merchant community to be followed from the month of Aipasi. The organizations mentioned are Sāliya-nagarattār, Vāṇiya-maḍigaiyār of Vaḍaparisāranaḍu, Akkai-sā[laiyār], Mūttasamakkaṭṭu alias Amaṭṭargaṇḍanterinda-Kaikkōḷar and Iḷaiyasamakkaṭṭu alias Vīrarājēndra terinda-kaikōḷar of Tañjāvūr alias Maṇṇiyūr-aḍikkīṭṭaḷam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecaripaṟparāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ cirivirarācentira tevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattonpatāvatuk ketir Āṟāvatu Aṟpicaittiṅkaḷ mutalāka vaṭaparicāra nāṭṭil cāliyanakarattomum vāṇiyamaṭikaiyo
yomum Akkaicālaiyomum mettalait tañcāvūrāṉa manniyūr Aṭikkiṭṭaḷattil muttacamakkaṭṭāṉa Amaṭṭamar kaṇṭan terinta kaikkoḷaromum cāmantar cenāpatikaḷomum Iḷaiya camakkaṭṭāna virarācentiran terinta kaikkoḷaro
Digital edition of SII 30.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
